regions.content:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T 7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受34.5N的拉力，
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: Stator lead wires according to GB/T 7345-2008: For the three-phase stator wires, each lead wire shall withstand a tensile force of 34.5N, After the test, the lead wires shall not break, and the insulation and conductor shall not be damaged.

labels.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受34.5N的拉力，
labels.translation_en_simple: For stator three-phase lines, each lead wire shall withstand 34.5N pull,
labels.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall be able to withstand a tensile force of 34.5 N,

labels.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
labels.translation_en_simple: After test, lead wire shall not break, insulation and core shall not be damaged.
labels.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire must not break, and the insulation and conductor core must not be damaged.

records.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受34.5N的拉力，
records.translation_en_simple: For stator three-phase lines, each lead wire shall withstand 34.5N pull,
records.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall be able to withstand a tensile force of 34.5 N,

records.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
records.translation_en_simple: After test, lead wire shall not break, insulation and core shall not be damaged.
records.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire must not break, and the insulation and conductor core must not be damaged.

ocr.text:
支术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
寸定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受34.5N的拉力，
式验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。

items.text: 寸定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受34.5N的拉力，
式验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
